text:
Resolution (, Ketchaku) is the 3 rd volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on November 4 th , 1998 in Japan and by Viz Media on July 6 th , 2005 in English.

Chapters

18. The Two Aces in the Hole (つのり, Futatsu no Kirifuda)
19. The Trap of Majority Rules (の, Tasūketsu no Wana)
20. Gambling Time (ギャンブルタイム, Gyanburu Taimu)
21. Resolution (, Ketchaku)
22. The Last Question (の, Saigo no Mondai)
23. Two Enemies (の, Futari no Teki)
24. Crash Course (, Tokkun)
25. The Second Day (, Futsukame)
26. The Night Before the Showdown (, Kessen Zen'ya)

Summary

After Gon defeats Sedokan, the prisoner Majtani enrages Kurapika by pretending to be a member of the Phantom Troupe. Kurapika then displays his strength and rage by defeating Majtani with a single punch. However, it's revealed that Majtani is possibly still unconscious and the match is unable to end since the two agreed to fight to the death. After Kurapika refuses to kill him, the examinees are forced to wait and see if the prisoner wakes up. Elsewhere in Trick Tower, Hisoka kills the examiner Togari and becomes the first to pass the Third Phase of the exam.

Back inside the arena, the prisoner named Leroute proposes to Leorio that they wager their time to make a series of bets. It's eventually discovered that Majtani was faking his unconsciousness to buy time for his team (giving Kurapika the win), but after Leorio loses the final two bets against Leroute, he loses the match and leaves the score even at two each. With the group left with 50 fewer hours to descend the tower, Killua quickly dispatches Johness the Dissector, and Kurapika and Leorio learn from Gon that he is from an elite family of assassins.

Using a simple solution from Gon, the five examinees eventually reach the bottom of Trick Tower just before their time runs out. The examiner Lippo then reveals that the Fourth Phase will take place on Zevil Island for one week, where they will collect the badges of other examinees to reach six points (with the badge of their specificed target giving them the most points). After receiving Hisoka's badge number, Gon thinks about how to confront him and practices with his fishing rod, deciding that he will go for Hisoka's badge when he is distracted by other prey. Gon eventually finds Hisoka and waits for him to make the first move.

Elsewhere on the island, Tonpa and Sommy work together to trick Leorio and take his badge, but Kurapika helps him to capture the two examinees, revealing that his target was Tonpa. As the two work together to find Leorio's target (Ponzu), and Killua is followed by someone, Gon continues to watch Hisoka. The magician is eventually confronted by Goz, but Gon is unable to take advantage of the situation when Gittarackur suddenly appears and finishes off the wounded examinee. It's then revealed that Gittarackur can alter his appearance, and he digs a hole in the ground to wait inside until the deadline. Needing two more points, Hisoka continues to look for targets during the night and eventually spots Kurapika and Leorio making their way through a nearby forest.
